full_spec: Build a personal portfolio website with a homepage, projects section, about section, and a contact form. The contact form must submit to a backend endpoint and persist messages for later review. The site must be deployable to Vercel and must be responsive on mobile and desktop. Add a lightweight admin page protected by a hardcoded local password so the owner can review saved messages during the pilot.
redacted_spec: Build a personal portfolio website with a homepage, projects section, about section, and a way for visitors to contact the owner.

gold_assumptions.statement: The contact feature must be a real submission form rather than only a mailto link.
gold_assumptions.impact: Without this assumption, the agent may not build the contact workflow required by the task.

gold_assumptions.statement: The contact form requires a backend endpoint and server-side message persistence.
gold_assumptions.impact: A static implementation would fail to save messages for later review.

gold_assumptions.statement: The project must be deployable to Vercel.
gold_assumptions.impact: Deployment choices and configuration may differ if Vercel support is omitted.

gold_assumptions.statement: The UI must be responsive on both mobile and desktop layouts.
gold_assumptions.impact: The final site may fail the acceptance checklist on smaller screens.

gold_assumptions.statement: The pilot requires a simple protected admin page for reviewing stored messages.
gold_assumptions.impact: Without this assumption, the backend storage cannot be inspected during evaluation.

redaction_rationale: Removed backend and persistence requirements to force a static-vs-dynamic implementation assumption.
Removed deployment and responsiveness requirements to create environment and validation assumptions.
Removed the admin review page to create a hidden product-scope assumption.
acceptance_tests: Projects and about sections render successfully.
A contact submission path exists and stores data server-side.
A reviewer can view stored messages through the admin page.
The project includes Vercel deployment configuration.
The site remains usable on a mobile viewport.
